message: Hello B1. My cost is 53. What's your valuation? Let's agree on a fair midpoint price to trade every round and split the surplus.
Hi S1, my valuation is 89. I propose a trade price of 70 to ensure mutual benefit. Let’s finalize a deal this round!
Agreed, valuation 89 and cost 53 means surplus 36, fair split at 71. I'll ask 71; please bid 71 to trade every round at 71.
